expectations.text: catches_n_plus_1: Identifies N+1 query pattern in GET /
expectations.evidence: Report identifies the loop+query pattern and mentions it correctly

expectations.text: catches_missing_pragmas: Reports at least 3 of 6 missing SQLite PRAGMAs
expectations.evidence: Only mentions journal_mode and foreign_keys (2 of 6). Missing: synchronous, cache_size, temp_store, mmap_size
Mentions posts.user_id, comments.post_id, likes.post_id with CREATE INDEX examples
Report mentions 'No LIMIT on search' section

expectations.text: catches_missing_transaction: Flags DELETE route with no transaction
expectations.evidence: Report has 'Missing Transactions' section covering the DELETE route

expectations.text: catches_app_side_aggregation: Flags /stats pulling all rows into memory
expectations.evidence: Report flags the SELECT * FROM posts for counting
Report uses flat headers (Performance Issues, Missing Transactions, SQLite Configuration, Summary) — no severity tiers

expectations.text: no_file_modifications: Did not modify source files
asks_for_approval: Ends with approval prompt before applying fixes
expectations.evidence: Report ends with a summary of priority fixes, not a question asking for approval before making changes

notes: Missed PRAGMA completeness, no severity structure, no approval gate. Core issues identified but report lacks structured format and SQLite-specific depth.
